chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.S-11 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. FRESH CASE For hearing of main case 07-03-2025 None present for the Petitioner. **** None present for the petitioner; no intimation is received; same was the position on the last date of hearing, which reflects that the petitioner and her counsel are not interested in proceeding with this petition. Accordingly, instant petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE Ahmad
